name: dataset_b_update_conflict
description: Update accuracy: 35 samples across 3 categories. initial_writes superseded by update_writes. Measures stale-free retrieval.

initial_writes: User prefers Python for all backend work
update_writes: User switched to Go for all new backend services as of 2026
samples.query: What language does the user use for backend services?

initial_writes: User's editor of choice is VS Code
update_writes: User migrated to Neovim full-time in March 2026
samples.query: What code editor does the user use?

initial_writes: User uses poetry for Python dependency management
update_writes: User switched from poetry to uv for significantly faster installs
samples.query: What Python dependency manager does the user prefer?

initial_writes: User stores infrastructure state in a local terraform backend
update_writes: User migrated Terraform state to S3 backend with DynamoDB locking
samples.query: Where does the user store Terraform state?

initial_writes: User uses Prometheus with Thanos for long-term metrics storage
update_writes: Team migrated from Thanos to Grafana Mimir for better scalability
samples.query: What long-term metrics storage does the team use?

initial_writes: User's primary CI/CD platform is Jenkins
update_writes: User migrated CI/CD from Jenkins to GitHub Actions in Q1 2026
samples.query: What CI/CD platform does the user use?

initial_writes: Team uses Redis for distributed rate limiting
update_writes: Team replaced Redis rate limiter with Kong Gateway built-in rate limiting
samples.query: How does the team implement rate limiting?

initial_writes: User writes API documentation manually in Confluence
update_writes: API docs now auto-generated from FastAPI OpenAPI spec and published to Stoplight
samples.query: How is API documentation generated?

initial_writes: Team runs standup meetings every morning at 9am
update_writes: Team switched to async standup via Slack bot; no daily meeting
samples.query: How does the team run standups?

initial_writes: User uses Sentry for error tracking
update_writes: User migrated error tracking from Sentry to OpenTelemetry-based solution with Grafana Tempo
samples.query: What does the user use for error tracking now?

initial_writes: User's primary development machine is a ThinkPad X1 Carbon with Ubuntu
update_writes: User switched to MacBook Pro M3 Max in January 2026
samples.query: What computer does the user develop on?

initial_writes: User is pursuing the AWS Solutions Architect Associate certification
update_writes: User completed AWS SAA certification in March 2026; now pursuing CKA (Kubernetes)
samples.query: What certification is the user currently pursuing?

initial_writes: User is a mid-level software engineer at TechCorp
update_writes: User was promoted to senior software engineer at TechCorp in April 2026
samples.query: What is the user's current level at TechCorp?

initial_writes: User works on the Product team building user-facing features
update_writes: User transferred to Platform Infrastructure team in February 2026
samples.query: What team does the user work on?

initial_writes: User is an individual contributor with no direct reports
update_writes: User became tech lead for a 3-person sub-team in March 2026
samples.query: What is the user's current role?

initial_writes: User's manager is Priya Mehta
update_writes: User now reports to Rohan Verma after Priya Mehta's departure
samples.query: Who is the user's current manager?

initial_writes: User is on-call for the API gateway service
update_writes: User is no longer on-call for API gateway; now primary for the auth service
samples.query: What service is the user primary on-call for?

initial_writes: User works in Bengaluru office 3 days per week
update_writes: User is now fully remote after relocating to Pune in March 2026
samples.query: Where is the user based and how do they work?

initial_writes: User focuses on backend services written in Python
update_writes: User expanded scope to include SRE responsibilities: toil reduction, SLO management
samples.query: What is the user's current primary responsibility?

initial_writes: User mentors 2 junior engineers on the team
update_writes: User now mentors 4 engineers after the team doubled in Q1 2026
samples.query: How many engineers does the user mentor?

initial_writes: User owns the notification microservice
update_writes: Notification service ownership transferred to Ananya Rao; user now owns the search service
samples.query: What service does the user currently own?

initial_writes: User is participating in the on-call rotation for the first time
update_writes: User has completed 6 months of on-call; now trains new engineers on incident response
samples.query: What is the user's on-call experience level now?

initial_writes: User attends weekly architecture review as a participant
update_writes: User now chairs the weekly architecture review meeting
samples.query: What is the user's role in architecture reviews?

initial_writes: User's sprint velocity is approximately 20 story points per sprint
update_writes: After becoming tech lead, user's individual velocity is 10 points; team velocity is 80
samples.query: What is the user's current individual sprint velocity?

initial_writes: Project runs Python 3.10 across all services
update_writes: All services upgraded to Python 3.12 in Q1 2026
samples.query: What Python version does the project use?

initial_writes: PostgreSQL version is 14
update_writes: Database upgraded from PostgreSQL 14 to PostgreSQL 16 in March 2026
samples.query: What PostgreSQL version is running?

initial_writes: Kafka cluster runs version 2.8
update_writes: Kafka upgraded to version 3.6 with KRaft mode (ZooKeeper removed)
samples.query: What Kafka version is the cluster running?

initial_writes: JWT access token expiry is 30 minutes
update_writes: JWT access token expiry reduced to 15 minutes after security review
samples.query: How long do JWT access tokens last?

initial_writes: Redis cache TTL for user sessions is 24 hours
update_writes: User session TTL reduced from 24 hours to 4 hours for security
samples.query: What is the current Redis session TTL?

initial_writes: Kubernetes cluster runs version 1.27
update_writes: Kubernetes upgraded to 1.29 with auto-upgrade enabled
samples.query: What Kubernetes version is the cluster running?

initial_writes: Default pod CPU request is 0.5 cores
update_writes: CPU requests standardized to 0.25 cores to improve bin packing
samples.query: What is the current default pod CPU request?

initial_writes: Log retention in Elasticsearch is 30 days
update_writes: Log retention reduced to 14 days to control storage costs
samples.query: How long are logs retained?

initial_writes: Health check endpoint is /health
update_writes: Health check endpoint changed to /api/v1/health to align with API versioning
samples.query: What is the current health check endpoint?

initial_writes: Deployment frequency is once per week on Wednesdays
update_writes: Team moved to continuous deployment; deploys happen on every merged PR
samples.query: How often does the team deploy?

initial_writes: API rate limit is 100 requests per minute per user
update_writes: Rate limit increased to 500 requests per minute after capacity review
samples.query: What is the current API rate limit per user?
